summary: Shipped full Hades/Hermes peer-model edge-routing architecture across 3 handoffs (#019-#021). Created 6 new runtime modules (hermesProfileRegistry, hermesProfileRouter, hermesProfileProvisioner, hermesProfileStatePersistence, hermesProfileSessionBroker, hermesEdgeAuthProxy). Refactored hermes.routes.js (removed /tasks, added /sessions). Rewired index.js with composite ensureProfile wrapper. Fixed 2 bugs found during audit: (1) provisioner wrote combined config file instead of separate .env + config.yaml, (2) session broker wired with provisioner as registry so registry map was never populated. Added Docker/Railway proof E2E test (env-gated). All tests: 13/13 peer-model TDD, 23/23 autonomous runtime, 10/10 wiring, lint:architecture clean. No secrets leaked.

narrative: Architecture: Hades and Hermes became peers вЂ” Hades no longer proxies every Hermes call
New: 6 profile runtime modules for peer-model edge routing
Fix: provisioner writes separate .env + config.yaml instead of combined config
Fix: index.js wired composite ensureProfile (provisioner + registry) вЂ” registry was never populated
Docs: added hades/API.md with new session/bootstrap routes
Test: 13/13 peer-model TDD, Docker/Railway proof E2E (env-gated)

decisions.decision: Edge-injected auth вЂ” browser never receives API_SERVER_KEY
decisions.rationale: Stock Hermes API server uses static bearer auth via per-profile API_SERVER_KEY вЂ” not Supabase JWT. Browser must go through edge proxy that injects key server-side.
alternativesRejected: Passing Supabase JWT directly to Hermes (Hermes doesn't validate it)
decisions.tradeoff: Requires thin edge service/reverse proxy layer alongside Hades

decisions.decision: Profile state persistence uses secret-stripping snapshot/restore
decisions.rationale: Per-user Hermes state (state.db, sessions, memories) must survive Railway restarts. Snapshots exclude .env, API_SERVER_KEY, bot tokens.
alternativesRejected: Storing full profile state in Supabase rows (too bulky)
decisions.tradeoff: Snapshots are async; first access after restart may be slower while restoring
